Lyrics.text:
Ry mahantra mahonena,
Tojo ady mifanesy,
Ka maniry famonjena,
Resy, very toky koa.

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Jereo Jesosy fa milonjy,
'Zany otanao tontolo,
Nanolotra aina ho Mpamonjy
Sady he manolokolo.

Ry fanahy malahelo
'Zay mandalo fitsapana,
Malahelo anao Jesosy,
Otanao hovahana.

O! ry very ô! Avia,
Ry mahantra feno ota,
Manatòna matokia,
Ho anao Gologota.
